official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the scoped default spawn body.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and set_default_spawn_position packet id.

field_notes.scope: Default overworld zero BlockPos, yaw, and pitch fixture only.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound set_default_spawn_position packet framing and dispatch/decode for LevelData.RespawnData.DEFAULT only; does not infer respawn, compass, world, or player state behavior.
